title: Modifier Entry
description: A single entry in the damage modifier, containing operator, value, and activation conditions. Multiple modifiers are applied in sequence.

operation.description: Operation type. add: add the value to the base value; multiply: multiply the base value by the value.

value.description: Value for the operation. For add operation, can be positive or negative (such as -5 means damage reduction); for multiply operation, usually a positive number (such as 0.05 means reduce to 5%).

condition.description: Condition, apply this modifier when the condition is met.

examples.description: Reduce impact damage by 5 points (not less than 0)
Reduce damage caused by slimes to 5%
